hero.title: Building digital connections,
hero.description: We connect people, places, and data through open digital twin technology — so communities, researchers, and institutions can understand and shape the places they share. Open source is how. Connection is why.
hero.videoFallback: Your browser does not support the video tag.

why.title: Places are shared. The tools to understand them shouldn't be locked away.
why.body: Digital twins concentrate knowledge about the buildings, neighbourhoods, and landscapes we share — but most of that knowledge sits behind proprietary walls, fragmented across disciplines, inaccessible to the people it concerns. We exist to put open, interoperable digital twin technology in the hands of researchers, communities, and institutions — and to connect the people building with it.

mission.title: We advance digital twin research, share what we learn, and grow the capacity of the people who use it.
mission.pillar1Body: Develop and maintain an open digital twin platform that lets researchers explore, analyze, and collaborate across BIM, GIS, and open data.
mission.pillar2Body: Foster a contributor ecosystem where developers, designers, and domain experts build extensions and integrations on shared infrastructure.
mission.pillar3Body: Offer training, educational resources, and capacity-building programs so people and institutions can use these tools confidently — and teach them onward.

openStandards.title: Open Standards
openStandards.description: Eliminate proprietary barriers and promote interoperability through open standards.

communityDriven.title: Community Driven
communityDriven.description: Build with and for the community.

transparent.title: Transparent
transparent.description: Foster trust and collaborative development through open source code.

imagination.title: Imagination
imagination.description: Challenge current boundaries that limit what is possible with open source digital technologies.

multidisciplinary.title: Multidisciplinary
multidisciplinary.description: Where we are today is evidence that we are stronger and smarter together.

accessible.title: Accessible
accessible.description: Empower everyone with intuitive, user-friendly tools that work directly in the browser.

pathways.title: Pick the path that fits.
pathways.subtitle: Every offering runs on a cost-recovery basis. Any surplus is reinvested in the platform and the community.

useFree.name: Use it free
useFree.headline: Try the hosted platform.
useFree.body: Spin up a Canadian-hosted instance with a free tier. Cost-recovery pricing for production use — no profit margin, no lock-in.

selfHost.name: Host it yourself
selfHost.headline: Run the open-source core.
selfHost.body: Full source, AGPL-3.0, documentation, and community support. Keep complete control over your data and infrastructure.

buildWithUs.name: Build with us
buildWithUs.headline: Co-create bespoke solutions.
buildWithUs.body: Custom development, specialized tools, and enterprise collaboration — built on the open core, delivered on a cost-recovery basis, contributed back where it benefits the commons.

learnTeach.name: Learn & teach
learnTeach.headline: Train your team. Equip the next generation.
learnTeach.body: Workshops, capacity-building programs, and educational resources for institutions adopting digital twin practice.

contributors.title: Built openly. Built together.
contributors.body: The core platform is open. So are the tools, extensions, and integrations that grow on top of it. Whether you write code, share datasets, design interfaces, or teach others — there's a place for you.

team.title: Who we are.
team.intro: Canadian not-for-profit. The platform is collective work; the foundation is how we keep it that way.

contact.title: Tell us how you'd like to connect.
contact.description: Whether you're a researcher, partner, contributor, or educator — start by telling us a bit about you. We'll route your message to the right person.

footer.description: A Canadian not-for-profit foundation building digital connections, together — through open, interoperable digital twin technology.
footer.governance: Canadian non-profit corporation. Board-governed. Source AGPL-3.0. Surplus reinvested in the platform and the community.
footer.stewardship: Stewarded by a Canadian not-for-profit organization for long-term public benefit
footer.copyright: Collab Digital Twins. All rights reserved.
